entry.title: The handmade beauty of Machine Age data visualizations
entry.quote: How William James, W.E.B. Du Bois, and Francis Galton thought with diagrams

entry.title: Google says 75% of the company's new code is AI-generated
entry.quote: "Recently, a particularly complex code migration done by agents and engineers working together was completed six times faster than was possible a year ago with engineers alone," Pichai said.

entry.title: What Have We Dumped On The Moon?
entry.quote: You might wonder why so much stuff was left, but if you think about it, it makes sense. The rockets can only bring back so much stuff.

entry.title: Don’t Use A.I. to Do This
entry.quote: Studies show that overreliance on these digital tools causes cognitive decline, but if current events are any indication, nobody’s making much of a contribution anyway. Go ahead and use A.I. however you like. Except art. If you use it for your art, you’re a freakin’ hack.

entry.title: I am building a cloud
entry.quote: I like computers... So it is no small thing for me when I admit: I do not like the cloud today.
